sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INTEGER, value NUMERIC, event_date DATE);
CREATE TABLE event_data (event_id INTEGER, date_value DATE);
INSERT INTO event_data VALUES (1, DATE '2023-01-05'), (2, DATE '2023-01-15');
SELECT id, subtract(value, (SELECT MAX(value) FROM test_data)) AS adjusted_value FROM test_data WHERE adjusted_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT e.event_id, e.date_value + INTERVAL subtract(id, 1) DAY AS new_event_date FROM event_data e JOIN test_data t ON e.event_id = t.id WHERE t.value > 2;
SELECT id, value, event_date FROM test_data WHERE event_date + INTERVAL subtract(value, 1) DAY > CURRENT_DATE;
SELECT e.event_id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_data WHERE event_date = e.date_value) AS event_count FROM event_data e GROUP BY e.event_id HAVING event_count > 0;
SELECT t.id, t.value, t.event_date FROM test_data t WHERE t.value IS NOT NULL OR t.event_date IS NULL;
SELECT t1.id, t1.value + (SELECT subtract(t2.value, 1) FROM test_data t2 WHERE t2.id = 3) AS combined_value FROM test_data t1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM event_data e LEFT JOIN test_data t ON e.date_value = t.event_date WHERE t.value IS NULL GROUP BY e.event_id HAVING COUNT(t.value) = 0;
